name: multi_clock_integer_assignment
description: Code should include an integer variable assigned in two or more separate always @(posedge clk) blocks, each with a different clock signal.

name: cross_clock_domain_scalar_integer
description: Code should include a scalar integer variable declared at module scope that is written by processes in different clock domains.

name: procedural_shared_integer_multi_always
description: Code should include a shared integer modified in multiple procedural blocks triggered by edge-sensitive signals.
